channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Iran appoints new supreme leader amid escalating US-Israel conflict
item.description: Iran has officially named Mojtaba Khamenei, son of the late Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, as its new supreme leader. The announcement comes as Iran faces extensive attacks from both the US and Israel, targe...

item.title: Mollie Jepsen Withdraws from Remaining Milano-Cortina Paralympic Events After Knee Injury
item.description: Mollie Jepsen, a prominent Canadian Para alpine skier from West Vancouver, B.C., has ended her participation in the Milano-Cortina Paralympic Games early due to a knee injury. The Canadian Paralympic ...

item.title: Chris Briney’s life and relationship with actress Isabel Machado
item.description: Chris Briney, born Christopher Thomas Briney on 24 March 1998 in Danbury, Connecticut, is an American actor known for roles in 'The Summer I Turned Pretty' and 'Mean Girls'. His dad, Michael Briney, a...

item.title: PCSO and MMDA deliver relief aid to Quezon City fire victims
item.description: Some 1,907 families affected by a fire in Barangay Pinyahan, Quezon City, have received immediate relief assistance from the Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) in partnership with the Metrop...

item.title: Couple successfully registers small strip of garden land after legal dispute
item.description: A couple in Westcott, Surrey, have successfully won a legal dispute over a small patch of grass outside their home, after their neighbours attempted to claim it with the placement of a garden gnome. E...

item.title: Wings of Compassion Foundation Gives School Bags and Book Dividers to Pupils in Oyo
item.description: The Wings of Compassion Foundation (WINCOF) don carry out charitable act for pupils wey no too get in Oyo town. Dem distribute 250 strong school bags plus plenty book dividers to children for two prim...

item.title: Middle East Airlines maintains operations from Beirut despite nearby conflict
item.description: Despite a week-long escalation of conflict between Israel and Hezbollah, Beirut’s Rafic Hariri International Airport remains operational, and Middle East Airlines (MEA) continues to fly passengers out...

item.title: Iran Crisis Risks Short-Term Gains and Long-Term Harm for African Commodity Exporters
item.description: The ongoing crisis involving Iran has sparked temporary spikes in global prices for oil, metals, and other commodities, which might look like good news for African countries that export these goods. C...

item.title: DG Shipping Advises Indian Seafarers to Stay Alert in West Asian Waters
item.description: The Directorate General of Shipping (DG Shipping) of India has issued a safety advisory to all Indian seafarers operating in the Persian Gulf, Strait of Hormuz, Gulf of Oman, and surrounding waters. T...

item.title: Fox News Apologizes for Airing Old Footage During Trump’s Attendance at Military Dignified Transfer
item.description: Fox News admitted to mistakenly showing archival footage of President Donald Trump at a dignified transfer ceremony instead of the event that occurred on Saturday, March 7, 2026, for six U.S. service ...

item.title: ASX drops $90 billion as oil spikes amid Iran conflict
item.description: The Australian sharemarket suffered a significant sell-off on Monday, wiping out nearly $90 billion, following escalating tensions in the Middle East. The surge in crude oil prices, which rose over 20...

item.title: Guide to Filing Personal Income Tax in Nigeria
item.description: For everybody wey dey earn money for Nigeria, filing personal income tax na legal matter wey you no fit ignore. Every person wey get income, whether you be worker, business owner, freelancer, trader, ...

item.title: City Power Reports 652 Cases of Cable Theft in Seven Months, Affecting Communities
item.description: Between July 2025 and January 2026, City Power in Johannesburg recorded a staggering 652 incidents of cable theft and vandalism, significantly exceeding their capacity to repair the infrastructure pro...

item.title: Ongoing Developments in the Middle East Conflict as of March 9, 2026
item.description: As of March 9, 2026, tensions continue to escalate in the Middle East, particularly involving the United States and Iran. Reports indicate a series of airstrikes conducted by US and Israeli forces tar...

item.title: Opinion: The Assault on Iran Stems Fundamentally from Israel's Conflict with Palestine
item.description: In this opinion piece, author Yakov Rabkin argues that the ongoing US-Israel war against Iran, which began with joint strikes on February 28, 2026, is not primarily about US interests or preventing an...

item.title: Reserve Bank updates rules for South Africans sending money abroad
item.description: The South African Reserve Bank has issued nine draft circulars for public comment following the announcements made in the March 2026 Budget Review. The circulars propose higher limits for cross-border...

item.title: Nigeria President Bola Tinubu and His Influential Wealthy Network
item.description: Nigeria's President Bola Tinubu entered office already well-connected with wealthy allies, which have been part of his public image for years. From Lagos kingmakers to business magnates, the president...

item.title: Keir Starmer holds call with Donald Trump to discuss military cooperation amid tensions over UK role in US strikes on Iran
item.description: Prime Minister Keir Starmer held a telephone conversation with US President Donald Trump on Sunday to address military cooperation between the UK and US in the ongoing conflict with Iran. The call fol...

item.title: Nairobi Floods Leave Residents Searching for Missing Woman as Climate Patterns Shift
item.description: Nairobi experienced severe flooding over the past week, causing loss of lives, displacement, and anxiety among residents. The floods were triggered by unexpected heavy downpours, highlighting the grow...

item.title: JMielle Performs 'Hero' as Mariah Carey and Luciano Pavarotti in YFSF Week 12
item.description: In Week 12 of Your Face Sounds Familiar (YFSF) 2026, the singing duo JMielle, composed of JM Dela Cerna and Marielle Montellano, delivered a standout performance that left audiences and judges in awe....
